issue 1: o_d_split inclues pace as offense, team season data isn't easily available on nba.com, making pace more tedious to estimate
todo 0: better validations, use mpg, cv rmse, cv r2
todo 1: game minutes could be much more precisely estimated using a constrained regression (see Scott for details)
todo 2: predicting 4th quarter minutes and +/- could add a lot of signal and is more doable than you might think (see Scott for details). if this is done, should consider moving to percentage of playing time, rather than binary indicator, or a combo of both
todo 3: mpg informed prior using low or no regularization bpm
min_threshold__note: minimum minutes to qualify for a game
min_games__note: minimum total games played to include a player; 0 = no filter
off_def_split__note: true (default): 4-pivot design (O_/D_ prefixes, 2 rows per game, target=tm_PTS, includes 'home' indicator). false: 2-pivot signed design (P_ prefix, 1 row per game; home players +1, road players -1).
ptdiff_type__note: only used when off_def_split=false. 'diff' (default): target = home_pts - road_pts. 'ratio': target = ((home_pts / road_pts) ^ ptdiff_exponent) * 100.
ptdiff_exponent__note: higher adjusts diminishing returns more strongly, only used when off_def_split=false and ptdiff_type=ratio. Exponent applied to the ratio before x100 scaling. 1.0 = raw ratio; <1 compresses blowouts.
feature_type__note: minutes = binary indicator (played >= min_threshold minutes); pct (not yet working) = stores fraction of 48 minutes played as the feature value
pace_adjustment__note: WIP — adjusts tm_PTS by per-game pace estimate before building the design matrix. Requires data/team_season_pace.csv (generated by research/pace_estimate.py). Blocked: team_season_stats data has unresolved quality issues. Do not enable until fixed.
preseason__note: true = include preseason games; false = exclude them from the design matrix
training_season_start__note: earliest season included in training data; set to null to include all seasons
glm_note: kwargs passed directly to H2OGeneralizedLinearEstimator — null values are excluded. Docs: https://docs.h2o.ai/h2o/latest-stable/h2o-docs/data-science/glm.html

glm_kwargs.family__note: tweedie might be most appropriate for count-like scoring data

season_types_note: Available: Regular, Playoffs, Preseason, All-Star, PlayIn, IST
mlflow_track_params__note: additional top-level job keys to log as MLflow params; min_threshold, threshold_type, min_games, season range, rapm_signal_threshold and all glm_kwargs are always included
google_sheets_id__note: spreadsheet ID from the sheet URL (/d/<ID>/edit); the sheet must be shared (Editor) with the service account email in GOOGLE_SHEETS_CREDS. Leave blank to auto-create (requires service account to have Drive storage).
rapm_signal_threshold_note: min name_signal to include a player in RAPM validation (run automatically in gpm stage); see data/rapm_30y.csv — signal = cos_best / (cos_best + cos_2nd)
